hypothesis.strategy: Add background sections to lowest-scoring articles, add footnoted references to articles with 0 sourcing, fix broken sibling links, expand stubs with cross-links and content, incorporate 25 new 2025-2026 papers from web research
hypothesis.reasoning: Past experiments show background sections yield +3-5 points per article, footnotes boost sourcing from 0 to 40-80, and fixing broken links improves consistency. Targeting 11 articles simultaneously should produce 3-5 composite points.

result.lesson: Targeting multiple mid-scoring articles simultaneously with background sections + footnotes + cross-links is highly effective. The strategy of fixing broken sibling links by using ../category/ path prefix eliminated consistency penalties across all tools-platforms and methodologies articles.
